sentences.arabic: التَّعَاوُنُ بَيْنَ الْمُوَظَّفِينَ يُؤَدِّي إِلَى النَّجَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Saradnja među zaposlenima vodi do uspjeha.
sentences.translationEn: Cooperation between employees leads to success.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَعْمَلُ كَفَرِيقٍ وَاحِدٍ لِتَحْقِيقِ أَهْدَافِ الشَّرِكَةِ.
sentences.translation: Radimo kao jedan tim kako bismo ostvarili ciljeve kompanije.
sentences.translationEn: We work as one team to achieve the company's goals.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ كُلُّ شَخْصٍ زَمِيلَهُ عِنْدَ وُجُودِ صُعُوبَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Svaka osoba pomaže svom kolegi kada postoji poteškoća.
sentences.translationEn: Each person helps their colleague when there is a difficulty.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الرُّوحُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ يَجْعَلُ الْبِيئَةَ مُرِيحَةً لِلْجَمِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj kolektivni duh čini okruženje ugodnim za sve.
sentences.translationEn: This collective spirit makes the environment comfortable for everyone.
